title: Coinverse
description: Coins/Money for Multiplayer Rpg/Smp in different themes
body:
📖Beschreibung:

 

A Mod that ads Coins for SMP servers(medival theme)

This mod is for Smp servers. The Players cant Craft Coins, its only avaliable in the creative Inventory. Players can trade and craft them into larger units.

Players cannot get coins on their own, they are only available in the Creative Inventory.

 

 

 

💵Coin designs:

The mod is available in different versions (different designs). You can see all of them under the "Versions" page above.

 

Designs(Click):
